text:
Survey Types and Coverage* 

Survey Type Administered to Following Coverage Type Care Addressed Years 
Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug (MA-PD) MA-PD All aspects of care (Part C and Part D) 2007-2025 
Medicare Advantage Only (MA-Only) MA-Only Part C aspects of care (there is no Part D) 2007-2025 
Medicare Advantage Preferred Provider Organization (PPO) MA-PPO All aspects of care (Part C and Part D) 2008-2012 
Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) FFS+PDP Part D aspects of care 2011-2025 
Original
